rationale: The cited paper appears only in a single footnote that notes an alternative interpretation of Bell, Chiang, and Padmanabhan (1999) regarding promotion-effect decomposition. In the citing article, this is peripheral to the main argument, which develops and estimates a multicategory attribute-based brand choice model. The citing paper does not build on, test, adapt, or otherwise use the cited paper's framework, measures, or findings in its own modeling or applications.
